cursor.standing: PROVED for the minimal stone — all green without root (in-process and cross-process), record permanent and complete, retention cycles after a month, temporary is physics, window visible and honest; dogfooded under the tester with a falsification tooth confirmed to bite.

window.standing: Born as a 'thing-for-akien-along-the-way' — a Cairn-native, Form-v0 replacement for the UU-tree sudoer stopgap so CC can self-serve root through an audited daemon.
Same-session correction: the first cut's 30-min idle timeout (CC over-add) was removed as misaligned with 'log in once a day' — idle is now opt-in, leaving the 24h cap as the sole automatic release.

PROVED for the minimal stone — all green without root (in-process and cross-process), record permanent and complete, retention cycles after a month, temporary is physics, window visible and honest; dogfooded under the tester with a falsification tooth confirmed to bite.
